task: Add an interactive sprint timeline chart to the MAH dashboard home page. Show all sprints as dots on a timeline (x-axis: date, y-axis: cost). Color by project. Hover shows sprint name, cost, and duration. Clicking a dot navigates to the sprint detail page. Replace or augment the existing simple bar chart. Use inline SVG (no external chart library). Style: dark theme matching existing dashboard (#0d0d18 bg, #141420 cards, purple/blue/amber accents by project).
